title: Computes CPUE-based Indicators of changes in Stock Abundance — cpue.ind
code: data(plesim) # MP control with CPUE: catch ~ weighted 4-year mean CPUE ctrl <- mpCtrl(est=mseCtrl(method=cpue.ind, args=list(index=1)),   hcr=mseCtrl(method=hockeystick.hcr, args=list(metric="wmean",   trigger=2000, output="catch", target=1.25e5)))  # Run the MP run <- mp(om, oem, control=ctrl, args=list(iy=2025, fy=2035)) #> 2025  - 2026  - 2027  - 2028  - 2029  - 2030  - 2031  - 2032  - 2033  - 2034  -   # Plot results plot(om, run)

title: Hockey-stick Harvest Control Rule — hockeystick.hcr
text: function implements hockey-stick shaped harvest control rule (HCR). commonly used set F effort, sometimes catch, measure stock status, estimated SSB depletion. function can take input, 'metric', can computed FLStock returned function run 'est' step. 'output' argument can set quantity OM projection method can understand, e.g. fbar, effort catch 'fwd.om'. HCR increases control variable linearly lower threshold (lim) trigger point (trigger), sets target level (target) metric trigger. decreasing line can cut point ('drop'), output values fall 'min' level set. See examples . function can also apply optional upper (dupp) lower (dlow) constraints changes control variable. constraints can applied either unconditionally (= TRUE) stock trigger.

title: Hockey-stick Harvest Control Rule — hockeystick.hcr
code: # Example dataset data(plesim)  # Sets up an mpCtrl using hockeystick(fbar~ssb) ctrl <- mpCtrl(est = mseCtrl(method=perfect.sa),   hcr = mseCtrl(method=hockeystick.hcr, args=list(metric="ssb", trigger=14000,      output="fbar", target=0.18)))  plot_hockeystick.hcr(ctrl) #> Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0. #> ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead. #> ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the mse package. #>   Please report the issue at <https://github.com/flr/mse/issues>.   # Sets up a 40:10 HCR mpCtrl using hockeystick(fbar~depletion) ctrl <- mpCtrl(est = mseCtrl(method=perfect.sa),   hcr = mseCtrl(method=hockeystick.hcr, args=list(     metric="depletion", trigger=0.40, lim=0.10,     output="fbar", target=0.18, min=0.02)))  plot_hockeystick.hcr(ctrl)   # Runs mp between 2021 and 2035 run <- mp(om, control=ctrl, args=list(iy=2021, fy=2035)) #> 2021  - 2022  - 2023  - 2024  - 2025  - 2026  - 2027  - 2028  - 2029  - 2030  - 2031  - 2032  - 2033  - 2034  -   # Plots results plot(om, run)

text: stk perceived FLStock object returned OEM module. ctrl fwdControl object output hcr step, containing HCR decision. args MSE run arguments, including sqy (status-quo years). tracking tracking object recording module decisions outputs. system Character, either "output" (default) "input". title: Indicator Implementation System Module — indicator.is
text: list containing: ctrl modified fwdControl scaled target values. tracking updated tracking object.

title: Indicator Implementation System Module — indicator.is
text: implementation system () function adjusts management decision HCR step multiplying reference quantity computed stock--age data perceived stock, allowing indicator-based management approaches. reference quantity can either status-quo fishing mortality (input system) catch (output system). system="output", function scales HCR target mean catch status-quo years. system="input", scales mean fishing mortality. approach allows MPs work relative rather absolute targets.

title: Indicator Implementation System Module — indicator.is
text: Ernesto Jardim, Iago Mosqueira

text: Calls mp() can run parallel using %dofuture%. Iterations om split across number availabnle workers, set call plan(). can specially improve computations MPs fitting kind model non-vectorizsed calculations. Progress simulation reported via progress bar set progressr package, global handler set using handlers(global=TRUE). bar works parallel plan set . Otherwise, simple print year run shown. args list controls timing simulation elements: iy: initial year simulation inn decisions made. required element args. fy: final year, defaults last year om object. y0: first data year, defaults first year om object. nsqy: number years status-quo calculations, defaults 3. data_lag: number years last data point decision year, defaults 1. management_lag: number years decision application. title: Run Multiple Management Procedure Scenarios — mps
text: Executes multiple runs Management Procedure (MP) iterating grid values single module's arguments. allows systematic exploration parameter sensitivity scenario comparisons, optionally parallel. extra options provided, single MP run returned FLmses object. options given, results either collected FLmses , statistics provided, combined single data.table performance statistics.

title: Run Multiple Management Procedure Scenarios — mps
code: mps(   om,   oem = NULL,   iem = NULL,   control = ctrl,   ctrl = control,   args,   statistics = NULL,   metrics = NULL,   type = character(1),   names = NULL,   parallel = TRUE,   perf = !is.null(statistics),   ... )

title: Run Multiple Management Procedure Scenarios — mps
text: om FLom object representing Operating Model. oem FLoem object Observation Error Model. Defaults NULL, case perfect.oem used internally mp(). iem FLiem object Implementation Error Model. Defaults NULL. control mpCtrl object defining MP modules arguments. Can also passed ctrl. ctrl Alias control; either may used. args list MSE run arguments, including minimum iy (initial projection year). May also contain seed set random seed reproducibility. statistics list performance statistic functions passed performance(). Required perf = TRUE. metrics list metric functions passed performance(). Defaults NULL. type Character string specifying type performance output. Passed performance(). Defaults character(1). names Optional character vector names runs. single string given, prepended auto-generated names. NULL, names constructed automatically module name, argument name(s), rounded values. parallel Logical. individual MP runs parallelised using future/doFuture? Defaults TRUE. Ignored one worker available. perf Logical. performance statistics computed returned instead full FLmse objects? Defaults TRUE statistics NULL. ... single named argument corresponding module present control, whose value named list argument vectors iterate . one module may varied per call (e.g. hcr = list(Ftarget = c(0.2, 0.3, 0.4))). Passing one named element raise error.

title: Run Multiple Management Procedure Scenarios — mps
text: perf = FALSE (statistics = NULL), FLmses object containing one FLmse result per parameter set. perf = TRUE, single data.table combining performance statistics across runs, additional columns varied argument values mp identifier column.

title: Run Multiple Management Procedure Scenarios — mps
text: function iterates combinations supplied module argument values. Arguments unequal length recycled length longest. Auto-generated run names take form <module>_<arg>_<value> single argument, <arg1>-<arg2>_<> multiple arguments. Parallel execution relies nbrOfWorkers doFuture::%dofuture%. Progress reported either per-MP per-iteration depending whether number runs exceeds number workers. Runs fail excluded output warning; runs fail, error raised.

title: Compute Performance Statistics for Management Procedure Evaluation — performance
text: Evaluates performance management procedure computing statistical metrics across simulated projections. Supports multiple input types (FLQuants, FLStock, FLStocks, FLom, FLmse, FLmses, lists) computes custom statistics defined formulas reference metrics reference points.

title: Compute Performance Statistics for Management Procedure Evaluation — performance
text: x object holding simulation results. Supported classes: FLQuants, FLStock, FLStocks, FLom, FLmse, FLmses, list. statistics list statistics compute. element must named list formula metadata (name, desc). See Details. refpts Reference points calculations, typically FLPar object. Defaults FLPar() (empty). years Years statistics computed. Can : vector years use named list year vectors (names become year labels output) Defaults last year input omitted. om Optional name operating model. type Optional name MP type. run Optional name model run. mp Optional combined MP name. Auto-generated provided. ... Additional arguments passed (e.g., custom metrics, tracking data). metrics Optional metrics object FLStock/FLStocks input. Can : FLQuants object pre-computed metrics list metric functions single function compute metrics control Logical. FLmse input, include HCR control arguments output? Defaults FALSE. probs Optional numeric vector quantiles (0-1) compute statistic distributions across iterations. NULL (default), returns mean values. mc.cores Integer. Number cores parallel processing handling lists FLStocks. Defaults 1 (sequential).

title: TAC implementation system module — tac.is
